clusters.title: More details revealed on death of FinMin official interdicted over $2.5M cyber fraud

versions.title: More details revealed on death of FinMin official interdicted over $2.5M cyber fraud
versions.deck: Assistant Director of the External Resources Department of the Ministry of Finance, Ranga Rajapaksa, who had been interdicted over the alleged USD 2.5 million cyber heist, was found dead under suspicious circumstances at his residence in Kuliyapitiya this evening (30). MORE..

clusters.title: Special police security deployed for May Day celebrations

versions.title: Special police security deployed for May Day celebrations
versions.deck: Sri Lanka Police have announced that special security arrangements will be in place tomorrow (01) as political parties and organizations prepare to hold May Day rallies and meetings in several parts of the island, including Colombo, to mark International Workers Day. MORE..

clusters.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options

versions.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
versions.deck: Oil prices jumped to their highest since 2022 after a report that the US military is set to brief President Donald Trump on new plans for potential action in the Iran war. MORE..

clusters.title: SC rules Sub-Inspector s fundamental rights violated, orders compensation

versions.title: SC rules Sub-Inspector s fundamental rights violated, orders compensation
versions.deck: The Supreme Court has ruled that the fundamental human rights of a Police Sub-Inspector (SI) were violated in when he was brutally assaulted during an incident that took place in 2022. MORE..

clusters.title: Sri Lanka introduces laws for Buddhist monks seeking to travel abroad after major drug bust

versions.title: Sri Lanka introduces laws for Buddhist monks seeking to travel abroad after major drug bust
versions.deck: The Sri Lankan government has decided to make it mandatory for Buddhist monks travelling abroad to obtain recommendations from their respective senior monk (Guru Hamuduruwo), the regional Buddhist leader, and the Mahanayaka Thero of their respective Nikaya. MORE..

versions.title: Iran s supreme leader vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities

clusters.title: Warm weather advisory issued for several provinces

versions.title: Warm weather advisory issued for several provinces
versions.deck: A warm weather advisory has been issued for residents of the Northern, North-Central, Eastern, Sabaragamuwa, North-Western provinces and the Monaragala district. MORE..

clusters.title: Daily FT to cost Rs. 100 from 4 May

versions.title: Daily FT to cost Rs. 100 from 4 May
versions.deck: Due to the increasing cost of distribution, energy, and imported materials required to publish the Daily FT, we regret to inform readers that we are compelled to increase the price of the Daily FT to Rs. 100 with effect from 4 May.

clusters.title: Finance Ministry official interdicted over $2.5M cyber fraud found dead at home

versions.title: Finance Ministry official interdicted over $2.5M cyber fraud found dead at home
versions.deck: An Assistant Director at the External Resources Department of the Finance Ministry, who had been interdicted over the alleged theft of USD 2.5 million by hackers, has reportedly been found dead under suspicious circumstances at his residence in Kuliyapitiya. MORE..

clusters.title: US seeks international help to reopen Strait of Hormuz as crude prices surge

versions.title: US seeks international help to reopen Strait of Hormuz as crude prices surge
versions.deck: The US is pushing for other countries to form an international coalition to restore freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz, according to a State Department cable seen by Reuters, as oil prices surged to their highest in more than four years on fears of longer-term disruptions to global fuel supplies. MORE..

clusters.title: Colombo s inflation rises to 5.4% in April 2026

versions.title: Colombo s inflation rises to 5.4% in April 2026
versions.deck: The overall rate of inflation, as measured by the Colombo Consumer Price Index (CCPI) on a year-on-year basis, increased to 5.4% in April 2026, up from 2.2% recorded in March 2026, according to the Department of Census and Statistics. MORE..

clusters.title: Advisory issued for severe lightning

versions.title: Advisory issued for severe lightning

versions.title: May Day mirror 2026: Sajith vs. Anura; SJB vs. JVP-NPP
versions.deck: May Day 2026 holds up a mirror before the country’s politico-electoral reality. Contrary to mirages of multipolarity, the political contest reveals itself as strategically bi-polar: Sajith Premadasa vs. Anura Dissanayake; SJB vs. JVP-NPP. The country’s essential choice of leadership in 2029 is discernible. It is a pity that the SLPP isn’t celebrating May Day. While 1 May is indeed a Poya (full moon) Day, it isn’t Vesak. clusters.title: Eran heads nine-member SLC Restructuring Committee

versions.title: Eran heads nine-member SLC Restructuring Committee
versions.deck: Sports Minister Sunil Kumara Gamage has appointed a nine-member Restructuring Committee for Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC) to run the affairs of cricket in the country, with former MP and State Minister Eran Wickramaratne as Chairman.

clusters.title: Eran quits SJB committees

versions.title: Eran quits SJB committees
versions.deck: Former Samagi Jana Balawegaya (SJB) MP Eran Wickramaratne has resigned from the party’s Working Committee and Management Committee after assuming duties as Chairman of the Restructuring Committee of Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC), SJB General Secretary Ranjith Madduma Bandara said yesterday. SJB sources said that Wickramaratne was due to be suspended from the party for breach.

clusters.title: Seylan Bank 1Q PAT up 5.25% to Rs. 2.91 b

versions.title: Seylan Bank 1Q PAT up 5.25% to Rs. 2.91 b
versions.deck: Seylan Bank PLC has reported a Profit After Tax (PAT) of Rs. 2.91 billion in the first quarter of 2026, up 5.25% from a year ago. The bank said it recorded a Profit Before Income Tax (PBT) of Rs. 4,548 million in 1Q 2026, against Rs. 4,199 million a year ago, reflecting a growth of 8.31%.

clusters.title: JXG up 37% on debut

versions.title: JXG up 37% on debut
versions.deck: Janashakthi Ltd., (JXG) ended 37% on the up yesterday, debuting on the Colombo Stock Exchange (CSE) Main Board. The share price gained Rs. 3.70 to close at Rs. 13.70. JXG successfully concluded its Rs. 5 billion initial public offering (IPO) at Rs. 10 per share earlier this month. It was the largest IPO in the past 14 years.

clusters.title: One Love Reggae Festival 2026 set for 7-9 August

versions.title: One Love Reggae Festival 2026 set for 7-9 August
versions.deck: South Asia’s first ever “One Love Reggae Festival” will be held from 7 to 9 August 2026 in Bentota Beach, its organisers announced yesterday. The festival will feature 9 legendary international reggae headlining artists making it one of the largest reggae gatherings ever staged in the region. Starting daily from 5.00 p.m. onwards, fans can expect three days of vibrant music, cultural expression, and unity.

versions.title: RPCs prepare palm oil investments ahead of potential ban lift
versions.deck: Regional Plantation Companies (RPCs) are preparing to invest in palm oil cultivation, expecting the Government to lift the seven-year ban. The shift was outlined at an industry roundtable organised by the Palm Oil Industry Association (POIA) and Watawala Plantations PLC, where companies set out plans to expand cultivation if policy changes. clusters.title: IRCSL rolls out digital motor insurance card

versions.title: IRCSL rolls out digital motor insurance card
versions.deck: The Insurance Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (IRCSL), together with the Insurance Association of Sri Lanka (IASL) and the Sri Lanka Police, has introduced the country’s first digital motor insurance card, marking a shift towards real-time verification and paperless enforcement.

clusters.title: PUCSL opens public consultation on electricity tariffs revision

versions.title: PUCSL opens public consultation on electricity tariffs revision
versions.deck: The Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL) yesterday announced launching a public consultation process following a revised electricity generation cost estimate submitted by National System Operator Ltd., on 27 April, driven largely by rising global fuel prices.

clusters.title: Why do people really pay taxes?

versions.title: Why do people really pay taxes?
versions.deck: In Sri Lanka, as in many developing economies, most citizens pay taxes almost without noticing it. Every supermarket bill, litre of fuel, mobile reload, restaurant payment, or transport fare quietly includes a tax component. These indirect taxes are built into prices, collected instantly, and rarely questioned. Direct taxes, however, are different. Income tax is visible, personal, and intentional. clusters.title: Hela Apparel unit exits UK-based Focus Brands for $ 8 m

versions.title: Hela Apparel unit exits UK-based Focus Brands for $ 8 m
versions.deck: Hela Apparel Holdings PLC yesterday confirmed the divestment of its stake in UK-based Focus Brands Ltd., to Emerald Investments Ltd., for a total consideration of $ 8 million. The company said its wholly-owned subsidiary, Hela Brands Ltd., (Mauritius), sold the entirety of its shareholding in Focus Brands Ltd., to two investors, Mohamed Salim Suhurdeen and Mohamed Salihu Fazeldeen, who are the shareholders of Emerald Investments.

clusters.title: Women in Sri Lanka’s Boards: The glass ceiling persists

versions.title: Women in Sri Lanka’s Boards: The glass ceiling persists
versions.deck: Sri Lanka presents a striking paradox. Women consistently outperform men in higher education, with tertiary enrolment at 23% for women against 16% for men, yet their participation in the formal labour force hovers around 34%, and their presence at the top of corporate Sri Lanka remains deeply marginal. versions.title: The big risks of being a Bank Non-Executive Chair or Director

What we had in common was not a coding language or STEM training. It was a high level of linguistic and analytical literacy. clusters.title: The mask of State virtue cannot hide the hollow within

versions.title: The mask of State virtue cannot hide the hollow within
versions.deck: When multimillion-dollar losses emerge from within the public treasury, it is not just money that disappears. It is trust. And trust, once fractured at the level of the state, does not self-repair through press releases, ministerial reshuffles, or the procedural comfort of a parliamentary majority. It deepens. It spreads like cancer. And eventually, it becomes the defining story of an era. The most dangerous risk facing any Government is not an
